ItacAcademyItem.Name: Venturati (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: There is one publication related to this Academy, but not in British Library collections: Fantasia in laude di Veniesia data in luce dalli accademici Venturati... (Venetia: Giuliani, 1628); another publication with the same title, appeared in 1582, but was not related to this Academy: Capriccioso Accademico degli Stravaganti, Fantasia composta in laude de Veniesia (In Venetia: appresso gli heredi di Francesco Rampzetto, in Calle della Rassa, 1582)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
